title: chenopodium triangulare
intro: Chenopodium triangulare, also known as Triangular Goosefoot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium triangulare include the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to make a topical treatment for skin conditions.
